en.value:
Activities under objective 1


	Project start up  ( Implementation strategy)
	Orient VCPC and DCPC on GBV (gender equality, GBV, child rights legal system with regard to child marriage, dowry, and VAW).
	Produce IEC materials (posters, audio visual, information package)   in child marriage in local language
	Allocate fund  to support innovative window opportunities  and  ideas, awareness  against child marriage and advance girls rights
	Support DCPC and VCPC awareness raising action (awareness campaigns, generating massage and information related to issue for wider sharing)
	Organize orientation to peer educators  on behavioral change communication, gender equality, GBV and community mobilization to eliminate child marriage and violence against women and girls
	Bio monthly review meetings/interaction with peer educators, VCPC and  change agent to review progress and issue and provide additional information and skill
	Support to felicitates influential "positive deviant"  (individual, families, community) who denounced harmful practices such child marriage, dowry and VAW
	Interaction among Aba Mero Palo UDAN, SAKCHAM and ATMANIRVAR projects of CARE Nepal  
	Campaign for domestic violence (child marriage) free VDC with collaboration with SAKCHAM team (only for Kapilbastu district)


Activities under objective 2


	Orient civil society organizations , groups to influence and mobilize  for the implementation of laws against child marriage and GBV
	 Organize orientation and impart skill and knowledge to the project team and partners on various issues that project is going to address (GBV, Do no Harm, child rights, legal instruments)
	 Develop information brief on GBV issues, based on religious scriptures and teachings
	 Conduct multi-religious seminars, specifically targeting men from different religions and including topics such as the effects and consequences of  early and unofficial marriage
	 Conduct Child marriage survey (six monthly)
	 Mobilization of Group Facilitator
	 Use mass media (community radio, street play  ) to reach large audiences coupled with interactive methodologies (call-in shows, discussion groups following serial dramas)
	 Produce facts sheets of  each  working  VDC,s social and economic costs of child marriage especially in the context of practices such as dowry and bride price
	 Trained and mobilize  60 selected  youth (18-20 years) as a  citizen  journalists  with media to communicate issue for policy action
	Interact with school management committees of all VDC and identify point persons in each school to raise awareness in schools
	Mobilize schools, teachers, district education office and school management committees to analyze reasons for drop-out of girls from schools and share widely the analysis for improvement
	Support to develop and implement mechanisms to better systematize marriage and birth registrations
	Promote public-private partnerships that are positioned to apply positive pressure to reduce early marriages, dowry and VAW
	Empower boys and girls  (10-14) by  developing their leadership and life skill / Mobilize boys  to organize issues based  (masculinity ) competitions for boys  in areas like drawing, cooking and stitching
	Capacity assessment/development of partners


Activities under objective 3


	Produce best practices and lesson learned to influence Government of Nepal’s to scale up of proven programming models policy, resource allocation  as well as  donors - to ensure they are tailored to support child marriage efforts globally.
	Support "Girls Not Brides" campaigns by organizing national campaigns on " Now It is my turn"   from districts to national level to employ  the programmatic lesson gained
	Develop mechanisms for community monitoring/audits of child marriage through VDC, Child clubs, VCPC and share analysis twice a year  for policy advocacy
	Organize every year  public hearing in each working district to share  existing laws and policy implementation against child marriage and dowry
	Engage with national coalitions to monitor the implementation of public policies and support advocacy initiatives at national levels
	Advocacy in country trainings
	Formation and strengthening Local Advisory Council
	Documentation in six monthly basis (Audio, Video, Info graphics, Briefs, fact sheet)


 

 

Activities under objective 4

 


	Orient  Civil Society / VDC secretaries on child marriage and GBV and its social and economic cost and role of VDC  to empower eliminate GBV and child
	Facilitate each VDC to develop strategy/action plan   to eliminate child marriage and dowry  and girls education program
	Lobby with major political parties to denounce against child marriage, VAW and dowry and enforce code conduct for members
	Conduct parental education monthly session in each ward
	Formation of child (girls up to 20 yrs) clubs in each ward
	Establish culture of celebrating "fatherhood" by organizing local ca

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
